username.description: Campaign Monitor API key, sent as the HTTP Basic auth username.

password.description: HTTP Basic auth password. Campaign Monitor allows this to be blank or a dummy value alongside the API key username; never logged.

base_url.description: Campaign Monitor API base URL override for tests or proxies.

client_id.description: Campaign Monitor client id, required for the 'campaigns', 'lists', and 'suppressionlist' streams (substituted into their paths).
